title: Software Developer (.NET / Web Applications) #81725
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: IT Consulting Firm
  • Position Title: Software Developer (.NET / Web Applications)
  • Working Location: Ubi
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Monday – Friday 10:00 AM – 07:00 PM)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary + Allowances + Bonus + Medical & Dental Benefits
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Analyze user and business needs, and develop, maintain, and improve in-house applications and scripts to meet those needs.
  • Develop application software or scripts whenever required.
  • Support the company on technical matters related to software development, when needed.
  • Conduct code reviews and perform testing.
  • Prepare documents such as design specifications and User Acceptance Test (UAT) documents and take part in reviews.
  • Design, optimize, and develop custom software solutions or scripts to add new functions required by the business.
  • Deliver projects by installing them on the company’s hosting servers or the client’s hosting environment.
  • Develop custom applications using .NET Framework, ASP.NET Core, Microsoft Visual Studio, and relational database management systems.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties as assigned

APPLY NOW!!!

  • At least 3 years of .NET development experience; more experienced candidates may be considered for senior roles.
  • Experience building enterprise-level systems, with strong programming, analytical, and communication skills.
  • Familiar with Agile, unit testing tools (preferably NUnit or xUnit), and writing technical specifications.
  • Strong in object-oriented programming, Entity Framework, and SQL database design, development, and maintenance.
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/Google Cloud), CI/CD, web service APIs, and front-end basics (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
  • An advantage to have experience in React.js/Node.js/Vue.js, Docker/Kubernetes, PowerShell (or similar scripting), SharePoint (Server/Online), CMS platforms (Sitefinity/Directus), and low-code platforms (Power Platform/OutSystems).

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81725 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
